title: HyBlock+
description: A must-have collection of mods for Hypixel Skyblock, improving gameplay, UI, and tools to give you the ultimate edge. Perfect for both beginners and seasoned players.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b34a5d62f1f7b8829e804169dab6be9cd02a3262_0.webp)
# Welcome to HyBlock+ – The Skyblock Modpack!

**HyBlock+* is designed to enhance your Hypixel SkyBlock experience without changing the core feel of the game. With useful quality-of-life improvements, a full UI overhaul and subtle gameplay enhancements, this modpack ensures smoother, more immersive adventures.
 
 
## Features:

● UI Overhaul & Quality-of-Life Improvements: Redesigned interfaces, NPC RPG CHAT, faster crafting, and streamlined resource handling.

● Gameplay Enhancements: Improved HUD displays, handy skill trackers, and practical tools for farming, mining, and dungeons.

● New Recipes & Automation: Additional crafting options and features to make managing your island more efficient.

● Performance Optimized: Reduced lag and stable framerates for long SkyBlock sessions.

● Community-Inspired: Developed with feedback from active SkyBlock players to address real needs.

For best Experience add the Furfsky Resourcepack!!


## 

 ✔️ Fully compatible with Hypixel SkyBlock
 
 ✔️ [52+ Mods]

 ✔️ Resourcepack Tweaks

 ✔️ Optimized performance
